# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: third-party-apis
spec:
  hosts:
    - example-api1.com
    - example-api2.com
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      tls: {}
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-databases
spec:
  hosts:
    - db-example1.com
    - db-example2.com
  ports:
    - number: 3306
      name: mysql
      tls: {}
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: default
spec:
  hosts:
    - "*"
  gateways:
    - Istio-EgressGateway
  http:
  - match:
    - uri:
        exact: /api1
    route:
    - destination:
        host: third-party-apis
        port:
          number: 443
—
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: default
spec:
  hosts:
    - "*"
  gateways:
    - Istio-EgressGateway
  tls: {}
  http:
  - match:
    - uri:
        exact: /api2
    route:
    - destination:
        host: third-party-apis
        port:
          number: 443
—
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: default
spec:
  hosts:
    - "*"
  gateways:
    - Istio-EgressGateway
  tls: {}
  http:
  - match:
    - uri:
        exact: /db1
    route:
    - destination:
        host: external-databases
        port:
          number: 3306
—
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: default
spec:
  hosts:
    - "*"
  gateways:
    - Istio-EgressGateway
  tls: {}
  http:
  - match:
    - uri:
        exact: /db2
    route:
    - destination:
        host: external-databases
        port:
          number: 3306
